name: Project & Task Management
description: CRUD API routes and UI for projects and tasks with SQLite persistence, Zod validation, SSE events, and responsive Kanban board. Handles PACT directory validation for PACT-enabled projects.

types.name: TaskStatus
types.description: Task workflow status for Kanban columns

fields.name: pact_directory_path
fields.description: Absolute path to PACT directory (null if not enabled)

types.name: ProjectInsert

fields.name: pact_directory_path
fields.description: Path to PACT directory (required if pact_enabled)

types.description: Data for creating a new project

types.name: ProjectUpdate

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Client's last known updated_at for optimistic locking

types.description: Data for updating an existing project

fields.name: display_order
fields.description: Position within status column for Kanban

types.name: TaskInsert
types.description: Data for creating a new task

types.name: TaskUpdate

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Client's last known updated_at for optimistic locking

types.description: Data for updating an existing task

types.name: PactDirectoryValidation
types.description: Result of PACT directory structure validation

types.name: StatusTransitionValidation
types.description: Result of task status transition validation

types.name: TaskStatusChangedEvent
types.description: SSE event for task status changes

functions.name: list_projects
functions.description: Retrieve paginated list of projects with optional filtering and sorting
postconditions: Returns projects ordered by sort criteria

functions.name: get_project
functions.description: Retrieve a single project by ID

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No project exists with given ID

postconditions: All timestamps are valid ISO 8601 strings

functions.name: create_project
functions.description: Create a new project with optional PACT integration. Validates PACT directory if enabled.

error_cases.name: duplicate_name
error_cases.condition: Project with same name already exists

preconditions: If pact_enabled is true, pact_directory_path must be provided
If pact_directory_path provided, must pass validatePactDirectory
postconditions: Returns project with generated ID and timestamps
pact_directory_path is stored as absolute resolved path if provided

structured_side_effects.description: Validates PACT directory structure if enabled

functions.name: update_project
functions.description: Update an existing project with optimistic concurrency control

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No project exists with given ID

preconditions: If pact_enabled changed to true, pact_directory_path must be valid
At least one field (other than updated_at) must be provided

structured_side_effects.description: Validates PACT directory if path changed

functions.name: delete_project
functions.description: Delete a project and all associated tasks (cascading delete)

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No project exists with given ID

postconditions: All associated tasks are deleted (foreign key cascade)

structured_side_effects.description: Deletes from projects and tasks tables

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n = number of associated tasks

functions.name: list_tasks
functions.description: Retrieve paginated list of tasks with filtering and sorting
preconditions: If filters.project_id provided, project must exist
postconditions: Tasks ordered by display_order within status columns when sorted by status

functions.name: get_task
functions.description: Retrieve a single task by ID

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No task exists with given ID

postconditions: All timestamps are valid ISO 8601 strings

functions.name: create_task
functions.description: Create a new task and publish TaskCreatedEvent to SSE bus
preconditions: If assignee_type != unassigned, assignee_name must be provided
postconditions: Returns task with generated ID and timestamps
display_order set to max + 1 within status column

functions.name: update_task
functions.description: Update an existing task with optimistic concurrency control. Publishes TaskUpdatedEvent or TaskStatusChangedEvent.

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No task exists with given ID

preconditions: If status changed, validateStatusTransition must pass
If assignee_type changed to agent/human, assignee_name must be provided
At least one field (other than updated_at) must be provided

functions.name: delete_task
functions.description: Delete a task and publish TaskDeletedEvent to SSE bus

error_cases.name: not_found
error_cases.condition: No task exists with given ID

functions.name: reorder_tasks
functions.description: Bulk update display_order for tasks in Kanban column (drag-and-drop support)

inputs.name: task_orders
inputs.description: List of {task_id: int, display_order: int, updated_at: str}

preconditions: All tasks belong to same project and status column
display_order values are unique within update set
postconditions: All specified tasks have updated display_order
updated_at timestamps refreshed for all affected tasks

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n = number of tasks to reorder

functions.name: validate_pact_directory
functions.description: Validate PACT directory structure (.pact/ subdirectory and pact.yaml file)

error_cases.name: filesystem_error
error_cases.condition: Path resolution or access check fails

postconditions: Returns validation result with resolved absolute path
errors list contains specific missing/invalid items
valid is true only if .pact/ exists and pact.yaml is readable

functions.name: validate_status_transition
functions.description: Validate whether a task status transition is allowed
preconditions: from_status and to_status are valid TaskStatus values
postconditions: Allowed transitions: backlog -> in_progress, in_progress -> review|backlog, review -> done|in_progress, done -> backlog
error_message provided if valid is false

functions.name: get_project_cost_summary
functions.description: Retrieve cost breakdown for a project over optional time period
preconditions: If period_start provided, must be valid ISO 8601
If period_end provided, must be >= period_start
postconditions: Returns aggregated cost data from agent activity logs
total_cost_usd is sum of all costs in period
total_tokens is sum of all tokens consumed

structured_side_effects.description: Reads from projects, tasks, and agent activity tables

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n = number of activity records in period

functions.name: bad_request
functions.description: Create a 400 Bad Request error response

functions.name: not_found
functions.description: Create a 404 Not Found error response
postconditions: message includes resource type and ID

functions.name: server_error
functions.description: Create a 500 Internal Server Error response

inputs.name: log_details
inputs.description: Internal details for logging (not exposed to client)

postconditions: log_details written to server logs but not included in response

functions.name: publish_task_event
functions.description: Publish a task-related event to SSE bus with heartbeat support

error_cases.name: serialization_error
error_cases.condition: Event cannot be serialized to JSON

preconditions: event has required fields for its type
event.version is set to current schema version (1)
postconditions: All connected clients receive event if subscribed

performance_budget.complexity: O(n) where n = number of connected SSE clients

invariants: All task.project_id values reference existing projects (foreign key constraint)
All task.display_order values are unique within (project_id, status) groups
All task.updated_at values are monotonically increasing for a given task
All project.pact_directory_path values are absolute paths or null
If task.assignee_type = 'unassigned', task.assignee_name must be null
If task.assignee_type != 'unassigned', task.assignee_name must be non-empty string
All timestamp fields are valid ISO 8601 strings
All enum fields contain only defined variant values
Project names are unique within the database
All SSE events include version field for schema evolution
requires: SQLite database with projects and tasks tables initialized
Next.js 15 Route Handlers for API endpoints
Tailwind CSS v4 for responsive styling at 375px minimum width
